030.name: Cart Merge
030.note: 15 blocked by firefox stability quirk — re-running on edge

groupB.rootCause: store-wide exclusive AUTOMATIC promo seals every cart; no promo-neutral product on storefront; even user own preset coupons rejected
groupB.fix: admin/API deactivate exclusive auto-promo, re-run, reactivate — QUEUED post-GroupA (avoid concurrent promo mutation)
emailBlock: CART-065 also needs email-verify + presets are public

groupA.rootCauseOfRemaining: slot-1 B2B cart corrupted/non-mutable (Apollo legacy-cart; all writes no-op, subtotal frozen $1266.99) — NOT parallel-unsafe

groupE.note: both prior blocks were wrong-approach; CART-021 via logout/login session persistence, CART-004 via live-discovered variation product (STD-002 alias too limited — single USD color)

passCaveat: CART-029 (lazy-reprice: stale on passive reload, correct after any write — not financial)
fail: CART-044 (no price-change indicator even after correct)
blocked: CART-030 (cannot isolate the auto-promo among 49 active to remove safely)
groupA_retry.cartFix: removeCart of 5 dup carts + logout/login cleared Apollo phantom

newFindings: B2B multi-cart write/read desync — user has 5 default carts; reads/writes hit different rows; cart-page load auto-appends orphan shipment+payment each visit (HIGH, backend xCart, reproducible)
Lazy-reprice on decrease — cart line reprices on write not on passive read-after-external-price-change (Low/Med UX, not financial)
CART-044 — no price-change indicator/badge/toast even after price corrects (Low/Med UX)

groupD_COOS.restored: store default-selected setting -> ON (verified); WH-001 inventory -> 49 (verified); cart emptied

final.note: from 31 BLOCKED: 17 recovered to PASS (+1 caveat), 1 real bug surfaced, ~10 env-design/infra-gated (promo store design + no test mailbox)
